comment: The curated shelf a FRESH PERSONAL brain arrives with. Pre-installed on first run only (install-if-absent); NEVER clobbers a populated installed.json — see seed_default_apps() in api/apps.py and project_rsync_installed_json_hazard. Single source of truth — edit this list to change the default shelf. Each app installs through the normal GitHub-URL brain-app path (clone -> validate manifest -> register). `id` is the manifest id (used for the install-if-absent precheck); the authoritative id/route/version come from each repo's brain-app.yaml at install time. Shelf = four memory-native apps (daybook/thread/self-portrait/ink) + poker + quantum for delight/breadth (operator-confirmed 2026-06-23). HEALTH/clinical apps (arztbrief/letter-ingestion) stay OFF the personal shelf — they belong to a per-brain-type hbar.health ORG-brain shelf (deferred, not built yet).
